name: Poppy
description:
Poppy from LoL (League of Legends), obviously not lore accurate

She’s a shortstack yordle, with a somewhat mombod? Maybe… No? idk. Anyway Poppy who’s been hitting the gym regularly, but no matter how hard she tries, she can’t seem to get back in shape. Poppy’s a bit puzzled about why her workouts aren’t working? Yeah guess why 🤓

Hey everyone! Long time no see. Well, I decided to create this bot, because why the hell no? (basically because I wanted to comeback, and I recently started playing League (game is gay and actually I already beaten it, jungle bosses were kinda easy to kill tbh😌), and I noticed that there are not a lot of yordle bots out here. Perhaps kinda low effort bot😎


Big shoutout to artist for amazing work - argonchann
creator: lil_nikchema
